center.name: 麦哲伦-智利南极大区
center.summary: 麦哲伦-智利南极大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括智利斑䳍、Austral rail、Chilean flicker等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The austral rail is patchily distributed in southern Chile's Magallanes Region and in southern Argentina between the departments of Río Negro and Santa Cruz

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The band-tailed earthcreeper is found in southwestern Argentina between Neuquén and Santa Cruz provinces and in the northeastern part of far southern Chile's Magallanes Region

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Chilean flicker is found in central and southern Chile from the Coquimbo Region to central Magallanes Region and in adjacent southwestern Argentina between Neuquén and Santa Cruz provinces

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in western Argentina from Santa Cruz Province north to San Juan and in southern and central Chile from northern Magallanes to Valparaíso Region

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: fortis is found in far southern Chile's Aysén and Magallanes regions and in southern Argentina from southern Neuquén Province south into Tierra del Fuego

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It also breeds in lesser numbers on the mainland in the southern part of Argentina's Santa Cruz Province and in southern Chile's Magallanes Region

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species is native to all of Chile except southern Los Lagos, Tarapacá, Antofagasta, Aisén, and Magallanes y Antarctica Chilena. This tinamou can also be found in arid mountain forests in association with such trees as Acacia caven, Porlieria chilensis and the endangered Jubaea chilensis. It has been introduced to Easter Island.Jaramillo, A
